privacy.title: Privacy Policy – Dividim
privacy.description: How Dividim collects, uses and protects your data.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Dividim respects the privacy of its users and complies with Apple and Google Play policies and applicable data protection law (including GDPR). This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
paragraphs: Dividim may access the following data with your explicit consent:
bullets: Push notifications: to notify you about project updates, shared expenses and reminders. You can turn them off at any time in your device settings.
Camera and photos: to let users add or change profile photos and project photos in the app.
Contacts: to make it easier to add collaborators to projects. Contact data is not stored or shared with third parties.
Anonymous usage information: for analytics and to improve the app experience.

sections.title: 3. Use of information
paragraphs: Information collected is used solely to:
bullets: Manage projects and collaboration within the app
Send service communications and important notices

sections.title: 4. Sharing of data
paragraphs: We do not share personal data with third parties without your explicit consent. Data may only be shared with third-party services that are strictly necessary for the app to function (e.g. notification services).

sections.title: 5. Security
paragraphs: We implement standard technical and organisational measures to protect users’ information. All access to sensitive data is based on explicit consent and in line with Apple and Google policies.

sections.title: 6. User rights
bullets: Revoke permissions granted within the app
Contact us with any questions about your data

sections.title: 7. Consent and revocation
paragraphs: By installing and using Dividim, you accept this privacy policy and the use of the permissions described. You can revoke permissions at any time in your device settings.

sections.title: 8. Contact
paragraphs: If you have questions or wish to exercise your rights, contact us at:

sections.title: 9. Changes to the policy
paragraphs: Dividim may update this policy. New versions will be published at this URL and within the app. We recommend reviewing the policy periodically for any updates.

sections.title: 10. App Store compliance
paragraphs: All permissions and data collected by Dividim are handled in accordance with Apple and Google Play policies. Information shown to users is clear, transparent and only for the purposes described in this policy.
